周煦两眼一睁，就是另一个时代！
下定决心要在这个时代大展拳脚，可低头看了看自己打补丁的裤腿和望的到头的农田，周煦觉得还是读书吧，读书改变命运！
大伯母呸说:泥腿子还想读书？
周煦考上了童生。
二伯母羡慕嫉妒:也就到头了！
又、又又考上了！
四婶婶说他运气好罢了。
周煦爹娘乐呵呵的说:是啊，运气好罢了，我家儿子要去京城了。
众人:……这山沟沟里还能飞出个金疙瘩？？
周煦躺在草地上思考人生，唉……运气好罢了……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/aa33c41698e36039d089851d3de2f295","author":"七月的八月","author_id":"","book_id":"7437049833145240638","book_name":"农家儿郎科举路，勋名耀山河！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#001030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7520069135305294361","read_count":"21259","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"808666"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"379","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,打脸,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/218d5a043df61c299c51419b4b53b44b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445798&x-signature=XcSboGYmEKZCUO%2BjWlVQgVTNrzw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"100316180587","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"110"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323182958920EB2B32831D3AA3A4F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16050,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8909},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1759970583,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7582068102060704537","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"补充：个人觉得打低分的原因是因为那些人急于剧情的速成,但说实话主角小时候尤其是在古代讲求尊老卑幼的年代,如何能够以一己之力改变整个时代的观念呢,我认为主角已经做得很好了,分家后懂得低调靠一己之力撑着家庭的发展,况且古代的贫民,极品亲戚本就比比皆是,贫苦的人生使他们只知道利己,在所难免,作者这部分已经写得很好了,後續主角功成名就后不就不敢惹了吗？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765341091,"group_id":"7437049833145240638","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"807488432117835"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7437049833145240638","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"214"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19232,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7582061649907303193","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔流畅,叙事能力佳,很喜欢作者的文笔,朴实却深刻,而且剧情节奏把控得很好,在人物的塑造将主角的人设设定的很美好,虽是本爽文,但不会让人觉得过于无聊,除了主线外,与其他的支线相辅相成,很期待作者每天的更新,感觉这本书被低估了,不论剧情还是人物都很完善,循序渐进。希望作者不要断更啊，我会努力发电的,好文一定会被看到,作者你写的很好！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765340502,"group_id":"7437049833145240638","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"整理書架中,沒放進分組就是還沒認真看","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4XSGiSAHKGjraorId1ukZE=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"807488432117835","user_name":"用户80748843"},"expand_extra":{},"user_i 很少看科举文 这本书真的戳我的点 主角没有说刚开始各种大刀阔斧的改变家里环境 一步步稳扎稳打 有的小说五六岁一上来弄个耕地机 还有什么脱粒机 各种来凸显自己的聪明  这本书主角很不错 没说因为穿越过来就不努力学习 也没有说借鉴现代古诗 靠自己勤奋努力来学习知识然后一步步到状元 很不错 追平了
